narratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने साफ-साफ कह दिया है कि अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly evokes fear by stating that a NATO attack on Russian cities would lead to unavoidable nuclear war, which is a classic fear-amplifying narrative about severe escalation.

narratives.evidence_quote: रक्षा एक्सपर्ट्स का मानना है कि अगर यूक्रेन इसी तरह से हमला करता रहा तो अगले साल मार्च-अप्रैल तक ये बेहद कमजोर हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: The text makes a speculative prediction about Ukraine becoming 'extremely weak' by a specific future date, which fits the definition of speculating on war outcomes.

narratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका में मौजूद रूस के एंबेसडर ने अमेरिका को चेतावनी दी है कि... अगर अमेरिका या नाटो ने हमला किया तो हम परमाणु हथियारों का इस्तेमाल कर सकते हैं.
narratives.reasoning: This is a direct threat of nuclear weapon use in response to a NATO/US attack, designed to elicit fear about catastrophic consequences.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: अगर रूस इन केबल्स को काटता है तो इसका असर पश्चिमी देशों समेत कई देशों की अर्थव्यवस्था पर पड़ेगा.
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights a potential negative outcome (economic impact) specifically for Western countries if Russia acts against internet cables, fitting the narrative of predicting adverse consequences for the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: By continuing the war we risk WWIII
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने साफ-साफ कह दिया है कि अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly warns that NATO support for Ukraine attacking Russian cities could lead to unavoidable nuclear war, evoking fear of a global escalation (WWIII) as a consequence of continuing the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इसके लिए रूस टैक्टिकल न्यूक्लियर वेपन यानी परमाणु हथियारों का इस्तेमाल कर सकता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia could use tactical nuclear weapons against Ukrainian cities, directly evoking fear about the employment of nuclear weapons.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: Russia will also attack other countries
subnarratives.evidence_quote: चौथा रास्ता है कि रूस नाटो के बाल्टिक और रोमानिया में मौजूद हथियार डिपो और लॉजिस्टिक्स पर हमला करके उसे बर्बाद कर दे.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement outlines a potential Russian course of action involving direct attacks on NATO member states (Baltic states and Romania), promoting the idea that Russia's aggression could extend beyond Ukraine to other countries.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस समंदर के अंदर खोज रहा है इंटरनेट केबल... अगर रूस इन केबल्स को काटता है तो इसका असर पश्चिमी देशों समेत कई देशों की अर्थव्यवस्था पर पड़ेगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: This detail about Russia potentially targeting undersea internet cables supports the parent narrative of amplifying war-related fears by describing a non-nuclear, asymmetric threat with global economic consequences, which does not fit the other specific subnarrative definitions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Ukrainian army is collapsing
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रक्षा एक्सपर्ट्स का मानना है कि अगर यूक्रेन इसी तरह से हमला करता रहा तो अगले साल मार्च-अप्रैल तक ये बेहद कमजोर हो जाएगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly speculates about a future outcome of the war, predicting that the Ukrainian military will become 'extremely weak' by a specific timeframe, which aligns with the definition of suggesting a significant decline in its effectiveness or strength.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: By continuing the war we risk WWIII
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने साफ-साफ कह दिया है कि अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly warns that NATO support for Ukraine could lead to nuclear war, evoking fear of a broader, catastrophic conflict (WWIII) if Russia is provoked.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इसके लिए रूस टैक्टिकल न्यूक्लियर वेपन यानी परमाणु हथियारों का इस्तेमाल कर सकता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia could use tactical nuclear weapons against Ukrainian cities, directly evoking fear about nuclear weapon use.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: NATO should/will directly intervene
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस के राष्ट्रपति व्लादिमीर पुतिन ने स्पष्ट कहा है कि अगर नाटो ने सीधा हमला किया तो जंग रूस और नाटो की होगी.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames the conflict as potentially escalating into a direct war between Russia and NATO, implying that NATO's direct intervention is a plausible and dangerous scenario.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस समंदर के अंदर खोज रहा है इंटरनेट केबल... अगर रूस इन केबल्स को काटता है तो इसका असर पश्चिमी देशों समेत कई देशों की अर्थव्यवस्था पर पड़ेगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: This describes a non-nuclear, asymmetric threat (attacking undersea cables) that Russia could employ to cause widespread economic chaos, amplifying war-related fears through a specific, disruptive action not covered by other subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर रूस इन केबल्स को काटता है तो इसका असर पश्चिमी देशों समेत कई देशों की अर्थव्यवस्था पर पड़ेगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly states that a potential Russian action (cutting internet cables) would negatively impact the economies of Western countries, framing Western infrastructure as vulnerable to Russian retaliation.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो ने सीधा हमला किया तो जंग रूस और नाटो की होगी।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement, along with the article's overall theme of escalating conflict and nuclear threats, promotes the idea that Western (NATO) military support for Ukraine will lead to a direct, catastrophic war between Russia and NATO, a negative consequence for the West not covered by the more specific subnarratives.
